name: alpha_dashboard
description: Produces a plain-English market snapshot covering Hyperliquid perps. Includes a short summary, overall bias call (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL with conviction), the main catalysts driving the read, items to monitor for a regime change, and a ranked list of the most bullish and bearish tickers.

value.description: Market overview with bias and analysis

sla.refundPolicy: Full refund if dashboard not delivered within 90 seconds
